allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in d['tree'] if t['type']=='blob' and t['path'].startswith\('src/'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import asyncio; from studiolive.discovery import discover; print\(asyncio.run\(discover\(timeout=8.0\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import asyncio; from studiolive.discovery import discover; import json; print\(json.dumps\(asyncio.run\(discover\(timeout=8.0\)\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from audiomix.app import create_app; from audiomix.config import load_settings; app = create_app\(load_settings\(\)\); print\('app built OK — routes:', len\(app.routes\)\)")
